All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Agent
 
AnimatedSprite
 
AnimatedSpriteInstance
 
Card
 
CardFlightAnimation
A card "particle" that lerps from source to destination with ease-out motion, fading to transparent as it arrives.
Color
 
ColorChangeAnimation
 
Deck
 
DelayAnimation
 
Direction
 
DiscardPile
 
DiscardPile.DiscardPileView
 
Game
A class that represents the state of the game.
Game.GameView
An immutable view of a Game.
Game.PlayerOrder
 
Game.TimeoutTracker
 
Game.UnresolvedCardBuffer
 
Hand
 
Hand.HandView
A class containing a (mutable) HandView.
HighlightAnimation
 
MCTSAgent
An abstract class that represents an Agent implementing some flavor of the MCTS algorithm.
Move
A class representing a move in the game.
MultiGameMain
 
Node
A class for an arbitrary node in the game tree.
Node.NodeState
An enum describing the state of moves the current player can do.
Node.NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults
 
Node.NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults.DrawSingleCardIdxs
A class containing constants that index into the q-values of a Node when the current player does not have a legal move and has to draw a card.
Node.NoLegalMovesIdxDefaults.DrawUnresolvedCardsIdxs
A class containing constants that index into the q-values of a Node when the current player has to pick up a bunch of cards due to a bunch of unresolved "Draw XX" cards
Observability
 
Pair<K,V>
 
RandomAgent

Registry.Parser<T>
